qa_pairs.question: What is an advantage of using a Synchronization client for Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: The advantage is that you can work on the files offline, i.e., when you do not have network connectivity. They will be synchronized when network connectivity is re-established.

qa_pairs.question: When do files synchronize after working offline with a Synchronization client?
qa_pairs.answer: They will be synchronized when network connectivity is re-established.

qa_pairs.question: What kind of tools can be used to copy files between a Unix computer and Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: You can use any available WebDAV command line clients to copy files between your Unix computer and Nextcloud.

qa_pairs.question: Which specific WebDAV command line clients are mentioned for use with Unix and Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Some available WebDAV command line clients are curl and cadaver.

qa_pairs.question: For what specific task are UNIX command line tools useful with Nextcloud?
qa_pairs.answer: Command line tools are useful when you want to copy data between a remote server you log in to and Nextcloud.
